hero.description:
A cute dinosaur that collects TOKAMAK (TON) tokens
by exploring, joining events, and playing games!

about.label: About
about.subtitle: With Tokamon, collecting TOKAMAK (TON) tokens is fun. Explore, join events, and play games to naturally accumulate tokens!

features.title: Go - Collect on the Move
features.desc: Visit local stores and earn TOKAMAK (TON) tokens. Collect tokens while walking and get stamp bonuses!

features.title: Drop - Earn from Events
features.desc: Join airdrop events prepared by Tokamon. Surprise rewards fall from the sky!

features.title: Play - Earn While Playing
features.desc: Earn TOKAMAK (TON) tokens by playing mini-games. The more you play, the more tokens you stack!

services.label: Services
services.subtitle: Walk, earn, and play! Three ways to collect TOKAMAK (TON) tokens with Tokamon.

go.description: Location-based reward service. Visit stores and earn TOKAMAK (TON) tokens! Collect stamps for bonus rewards.
go.detailDesc: Tokamon Go is a location-based reward service where you earn TOKAMAK (TON) tokens by visiting real stores. Find nearby spots on the map, visit to claim tokens, and collect stamps for bonus rewards!

flow.title: Find Spots
flow.desc: Check reward spots near you on the map.

flow.title: Visit Store
flow.desc: Go to the store with a spot. Location is verified via GPS.

flow.title: Claim Tokens
flow.desc: Tap the Claim button and TOKAMAK (TON) tokens go to your wallet!

flow.title: Stamp Bonus
flow.desc: Multiple visits earn stamps, and stamps earn bonus TOKAMAK (TON)!

drop.description: Airdrops by Tokamon! Join various events and earn TOKAMAK (TON) tokens.
drop.detailDesc: Tokamon Drop is a service where you can receive TOKAMAK (TON) token airdrops through various events and campaigns. Earn tokens just by participating in social missions, quizzes, and community activities!

flow.title: Check Events
flow.desc: See ongoing airdrop events and rewards.

flow.title: Complete Missions
flow.desc: Complete simple missions like social follows, quizzes, and community participation.

flow.title: Claim Rewards
flow.desc: TOKAMAK (TON) tokens are automatically distributed after mission completion.

flow.title: Get Notified
flow.desc: Never miss new drop events with notifications!

play.description: Mini-games with Tokamon! Play-to-Earn while having fun with games.
play.detailDesc: Tokamon Play is a Play-to-Earn service where you earn TOKAMAK (TON) tokens by playing simple and fun mini-games. Challenge yourself in various games with the Tokamon character!

flow.title: Choose a Game
flow.desc: Pick from puzzles, arcade, cards, and more mini-games.

flow.title: Play
flow.desc: Simple controls that anyone can enjoy.

flow.title: Rank Up
flow.desc: Compete with other users and climb the rankings.

flow.title: Earn Rewards
flow.desc: Receive TOKAMAK (TON) token rewards based on your game results!

footer.tagline: A cute dinosaur that collects TOKAMAK (TON) tokens
